session.user:
Run ALL of these commands and report the results:
1. uv run pytest tests/commands/test_reconcile.py -v 2. uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py 3. uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py
Report all results including pass/fail and any error messages.
session.assistant: I'll run all three commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on test_reconcile.py with verbose output

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py
Run type checker on three reconcile command files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py
Run ruff linter on three reconcile command files

session.tool_result:
============================= test session starts ============================== platform linux -- Python 3.13.12, pytest-9.0.2, pluggy-1.6.0 rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk configfile: pyproject.toml plugins: anyio-4.12.1, cov-7.0.0, xdist-3.8.0, asyncio-1.3.0 asyncio: mode=Mode.AUTO, debug=False, asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope=function, asyncio_default_test_loop_scope=function collected 23 items
tests/commands/test_reconcile.py ....................... [100%]
============================== 23 passed in 0.72s ==============================
session.assistant:
All commands passed successfully!
**Results Summary:**
1. **pytest tests/commands/test_reconcile.py -v** - Status: PASSED - 23 tests passed in 0.72s
2. **ty check src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py** - Status: PASSED - All checks passed (no type errors)
3. **ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py** - Status: PASSED - All checks passed (no linting violations)
All code quality checks are passing cleanly.
